methods.name: Expand
methods.summary: Expand or collapse this content section.

params.name: expand
params.doc: If true then expand the content section otherwise collapse it.

methods.name: FromWindow
methods.summary: Find the UserInterfaceSection that created the specified instance of a window.

params.name: window
params.doc: If window is not null then look for the UserInterfaceSection that created the window.

returns.doc: If a UserInterfaceSection object is found containing a reference to the requested window then return the object otherwise return null.

methods.name: GetContentList
methods.summary: Returns a list of currently selected content items to be edited.

returns.doc: Returns a list of currently selected content items to be edited.

methods.name: Show
methods.summary: Show or hide this content section.

params.name: visible
params.doc: If true then show the content section otherwise hide it.

properties.name: RenderContent
properties.summary: The RenderContent object that created this user interface object.

properties.name: Window
properties.summary: The user control associated with this user interface object.
